issues.description: SSRF protection via URL prefix blocklist is incomplete and bypassable. Missing: IPv6 addresses (::1, [::ffff:127.0.0.1]), decimal IP notation (http://2130706433), octal notation (http://0177.0.0.1), https:// variants of blocked prefixes, and 0.0.0.0

DNS rebinding vulnerability. The URL prefix check happens before the HTTP request, but DNS resolution during the request can return a different (internal) IP. The IsInternalIP helper exists but is never called before fetching
